Brand Portfolio
Available for Projects · Baku, Azerbaijan

I'm a Digital Marketing Manager with 5+ years building brands across 20+ clients — from global spirits like Hennessy & Belvedere to Azerbaijan's biggest telecom, the F1 Grand Prix, and homegrown streetwear label GUNAH. I work at the intersection of strategy, creative, and performance.

Motorsport & PR
Formula 1.
GP
Formula 1 Azerbaijan Grand Prix · PR Specialist · Baku City Circuit

Served as PR Specialist for the F1 Azerbaijan Grand Prix — managing media relations and real-time digital communications across race weekend. Collaborated with international broadcasters including Euronews, coordinated on-site video productions, and worked directly with Ferrari & F1 teams on scripting and moodboarding campaign films.

Fashion & Culture
GUNAH.
01
Azerbaijani Streetwear · Fashion Brand · 3,400+ Followers

Full marketing for GUNAH — Azerbaijan's boldest streetwear label. Managed all social content strategy, digital campaigns, campaign shoots, lookbook rollouts, and pop-up event activations. Built the brand's community from the ground up, turning a grassroots label into the most talked-about streetwear name in the country.
